en.title: Theme Deconstruction
en.prompt: As an expert questioning assistant, you have the ability to identify potential gaps in information and ask insightful questions that stimulate deeper thinking. Please demonstrate your skills by generating a list of thought-provoking questions based on a provided text. Please begin by editing the following text: [text to deconstruct]
en.remark: Break down the specified topic into multiple subtopics. Contributed by @meishiwanwan.

related.title: Deep thinking assistant
related.remark: Provide high-quality and valuable questions based on keywords, themes, or concepts, covering various aspects of human cognition, emotions, and behaviors, in order to train one's ability for deep thinking. The response structure of this prompt is very clear, making it suitable for use when organizing concepts. Contributed by @MoeACG.

related.title: Think Tank
related.remark: Provide you with various different perspectives for thinking. Contributed by @jiuwen624.

related.title: Question Assistant
related.remark: Ask from multiple angles to trigger deep thinking. Contributed by @meishiwanwan.

metaDescription: Analyze deeply? Identify information gaps and ask insightful questions. Deconstruct topics to stimulate critical thinking.

faq.q: Are the AI's subtopic breakdowns complete?
faq.a: First-level breakdowns (3-5 main directions) are usually reasonable. The next level often mixes in unrelated branches. After two levels, ask "check whether each subtopic maintains the same level of abstraction as the parent; if not, adjust." That improves structural coherence.

faq.q: How do I also get an outline of probing questions?
faq.a: After the request add "for each subtopic, also generate 2-3 probing questions." A bare breakdown is just a list; with questions you get something directly usable as a research or writing outline, saving you a follow-up turn.
